With.Name: Main
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: SellingFrequency --SellingFrequency -Expression: Limit --Limit -Expression: ActualStock --ActualStock -Expression: LastSaleDays --LastSaleDays -Expression: SellThrough --SellThrough -Expression: PotentiallyLostSales --PotentiallyLostSales -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: SellingFrequency ---MAX(SellingFrequency) OVER() AS TotalSellingFrequency --Expression: Limit ---MAX(Limit) OVER() AS TotalLimit --Expression: ActualStock ---SUM(ActualStock) OVER() AS TotalActualStock --Expression: LastSaleDays ---MAX(LastSaleDays) OVER() AS TotalLastSaleDays --Expression: SellThrough ---SUM(SellThrough) OVER() AS TotalSellThrough --Expression: PotentiallyLostSales ---SUM(PotentiallyLostSales) OVER() AS TotalPotentiallyLostSales }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products }} {{Pagination}}
